# `draw.verticalLine`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `lines`
> **Wire kind:** `vertical-line`

Draw a vertical line at the supplied `time` that spans the full
viewport height.

## Anchors

`time` — a single `Time`

Anchor count: 1.

## Signature

```ts
function verticalLine(time: Time, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.verticalLine(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.verticalLine demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.verticalLine(bar.time, { color: "#f97316" });
        },
    });
```
